filter.title: Filter leads
filter.hint: Narrow the leads board by period, project, group, sub-status and source.

delete.title: Delete lead
delete.message: Delete "{{name}}"? The lead will move to the recycle bin and can be restored within 30 days.

dropPicker.title: Which sub-status should it go to?

sourcesModal.title: Lead sources
sourcesModal.hint: Where the inquiry came from. Pick a color and name, and the source shows on lead cards and in filters.
sourcesModal.empty: No sources yet. Add your first.
sourcesModal.deleteMessage: Delete "{{name}}"? Leads with this source will be left without one. You can restore it from the recycle bin within 30 days.

statusesPanel.intro: Manage sub-statuses under each top-level category. Sub-statuses appear when you set a color dot on a lead card, and are used for filtering and charts.
statusesPanel.deleteMessage: Delete "{{name}}"? Leads marked with it will be left without a sub-status. You can restore it from the recycle bin within 30 days.

pages.title: Lead pages
pages.subtitle: Public landing pages for collecting leads
pages.empty: No lead pages yet. Create your first page to collect leads automatically.
pages.copyFailed: Can't copy automatically — select and copy the link manually.
pages.intakeInfoAuto: Leads from this page go straight to the leads board, without approval. You can switch to "Needs approval" in the page settings.
pages.intakeInfoManual: Leads from this page don't come in directly — they wait in "Pending approval" (and in "Needs attention" on the home screen), and only enter the board after you approve them. You can switch to "Auto-intake" in the page settings.
pages.errNeedTitle: The page needs an internal name (for identification only).
pages.errChoiceOptions: A choice field needs at least two options.
pages.errSlugInvalid: The short link must be 3–40 characters: lowercase English letters, digits and hyphens.
pages.errSlugTaken: That short link is already taken — choose another.
pages.internalName: Internal name (for identification, not shown on the page)
pages.publishHint: When off — a draft, not publicly accessible.
pages.autoApproveHint: When off — leads wait for manual approval.
pages.projectHint: Leads from the page will be linked to the project, and the project screen will show a link to the page.
pages.bookingHint: A button leading to the booking page you choose will appear at the bottom of the page (published pages only).
pages.slugHint: A short, readable link instead of the long ID. Lowercase English letters, digits and hyphens (3–40). If empty — we'll use the ID.
pages.publishForLink: Publish the page to get a public link.

publicPage.submitError: An error occurred while submitting. Please try again in a moment.
publicPage.notFoundBody: The link may be wrong or the page may no longer be active.
publicPage.thankYouFallback: Thank you! We received your inquiry and will get back to you soon.
